title: Hugging Face confirms breach affected internal datasets and credentials, urges users to take action
summary: While it’s common for hackers to try to break into a company’s network using stolen employee credentials, keys, or a weak point in their security perimeter, this incident underscores the challenges that companies like Hugging Face face when hackers try to abuse…
